name: Terraqueous RV Resort
description:
The courts are located in Terraqueous RV Resort, register to play at the office where you also have access to the snack shack and lounge & receive a park guest pass, restrooms are located at the sports court.  The pickleball courts are fenced on volly sides.
 The sports complex has a children's playground, the pickleball courts, 2 bocce ball lanes, horseshoes and sensory hill, sandbox for the young and young at heart.
open_play_schedule: These are the office hours in order to registered to play,  the courts are lighted from dusk to 10pm.
fees: Fee required — $5 per day or $40 per month for a play pass
